name: CONGENITAL PULMONARY VENOLOBAR SYNDROME
definition: SCIMITAR SYNDROME unique form of congenital lung underdevelopment affecting one / more lobes in a constellation uncommon variant of hypogenetic lung syndrome in which RLL crosses midline between
dominant_finding: retrosternal band on lateral CXR ← mediastinal rotation
distribution: solid mass along posterior right hemidiaphragm (if trapped lung is unaerated)
discriminating_features: hypoplasia / aplasia of one / more lobes of the lung with errors in lobation (=

large ipsilateral apical cap + blunted costophrenic angle
